## Meeting Purpose

[Plan Q3 pipeline generation strategy and optimize meeting booking conversion rate](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Form conversion issues**: Form submissions are low (\~9/week) with poor form-to-meeting conversion; team will reduce qualification barriers that are currently preventing meetings from being booked](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Two-track outreach approach**: Marcel will work high-priority accounts with personal connections while the broader team will handle secondary targets with structured follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [**Event strategy**: Multiple events planned through Q3/Q4 (dinners, AI Growth Summit, workshops) need proper structuring; Marcel, Kyle and Jason will create a concrete event calendar this week](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [**Action acceleration**: Lists of target accounts will be created in HubSpot for systematic outreach with Jason owning list creation by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

## Topics

### Current Pipeline Metrics & Qualification Barriers

  - [Form submissions are tracking at \~9 per week with recent spike (potentially correlated with Marcel's posts)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Very low conversion rate from form submissions to booked meetings due to strict qualification criteria](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current qualification filters primarily on budget and traffic metrics](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Marcel wants to "open the gates" by reducing qualification barriers and manually reviewing/declining meetings afterward](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Need to make outreach feel more human/personal rather than a typical SaaS funnel experience](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### Account Targeting Strategy

  - [Creating two prioritized lists in HubSpot:](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
      - [High-priority list (\~10 accounts) for Marcel's direct outreach via personal connections](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [Broader secondary list for team outreach through more structured approaches](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Signals for target accounts include workshop attendance, social engagement, and firmographic criteria](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Jason will own creation of these lists by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized personal touch effectiveness (example: secured conference speaking slot through network connections within hours)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Outreach Approach & Sequences

  - [Sequences need to be reworked to sound more authentic and "Marcel-like" - shorter paragraphs, casual tone](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Every touch should provide more value than what's being asked from prospects](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Need to coordinate multiple touch points across accounts (Marcel working CEO/CMO level while team works director level)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Immediate follow-up on event registrations needed (20+ people register daily)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Success example: Redis opportunity secured after consistent LinkedIn follow-ups spanning months](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Events Calendar Planning

  - [Multiple confirmed events:](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Madrona dinner (August, targeting founders)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Workshop recording (August 1st)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [WebStacks happy hour (Sept 3-4)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [Understory event (Sept 17)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
      - [Amsterdam conference (Oct 29)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Planning AI Growth Summit with multiple potential partners (HockeyStick, Hyper Growth, AI Lean, Common Room)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [Venue options being evaluated (Gallery 308 at Fort Mason, \~$150K for full day)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Monthly webinars/workshops as ongoing lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Office breakfasts with 20-30 capacity (more flexibility than previous 18-person limit)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joe to remove some qualification filters to increase meeting bookings](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Jason to create two target account lists in HubSpot by Friday (Marcel-focused and team-focused)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Marcel, Kyle and Jason to draft consolidated event calendar this week (20-minute session)](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Extend Friday pipeline meetings to 1 hour to cover pipeline generation + event planning](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Set up shared inbox solution to better manage Marcel's communication with prospects](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Onboard Tyler (starting Monday) with proper shadowing plan, especially with Kyle out week of August 4th](https://fathom.video/share/iitQtQpgBRzesQLdr3McE9JRrxzzHUHD?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
